events.title: In-person! Vogue Practice Session
events.description: Practice for the balls! Vogue drop-in. All are welcome. These [almost] weekly sessions are free unless the event is a ball. 6pm-9pm. (Recurring weekly.)

events.title: In-person! Weekly improvised music drop-in jam session
events.description: Weekly Improvised Music Session. All are welcome to come and jam. Any genre/instrument/experience level welcome. Almost every Wednesday 12pm-2pm. (Recurring weekly.)

events.title: In-person! Philly to Palestine Fashion Show
events.description: Philly to Palestine Fashion Show. A night of fashion, a raffle (including two palm-sized tattoos donated by local artists), and a dance floor. 100% of proceeds split between the West Philly housing stabilization fund (a project of Kol Tzedek and YEAH Philly) and Hiba's family in Gaza. Doors 7pm, fashion show 8pm, dance floor 9:30pm.
